overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked urban environment. The player moves from a covered underpass through a green-tiled tunnel and emerges into an open plaza beneath a massive circular highway structure, with neon advertisements and wet streets visible throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban underpass approaching tunnel entrance

events.description: approaching and entering the tunnel entrance from the underpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the tunnel entrance beneath the concrete overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead with visible support beams
dark arched tunnel entrance with illuminated interior
highway sign indicating Pacifica and Coastview directions
red illuminated warning sign above tunnel entrance
tall street lamp with bright overhead light
paved pedestrian walkway alongside the road

segments.scene_description: The scene opens under a massive concrete highway overpass at night. The camera approaches a tunnel entrance marked with directional signs for Pacifica and a red danger warning. Street lamps cast artificial light on the wet asphalt as the player walks toward the dark tunnel mouth.

agents.ego_description: walking through the enclosed tunnel with green ceramic walls on the right

entered.detail: curved wall covered in glossy green rectangular ceramic tiles
smooth concrete tunnel ceiling with embedded lighting fixtures
series of overhead lights illuminating the tunnel interior
painted curb markings alternating yellow and green stripes

segments.scene_description: Inside the tunnel, the environment is enclosed with distinctive green ceramic tiles lining the right wall. Recessed overhead lights provide artificial illumination along the curved path. The player continues walking forward through the narrow corridor with no other pedestrians or vehicles present.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered exit ramp with concrete walls

events.description: exiting the green tiled tunnel into concrete-walled exit ramp

agents.ego_description: walking along the exit ramp with concrete walls on the right and barriers on the left

entered.detail: smooth concrete retaining wall with horizontal panel lines
overhead street lamps mounted on poles along the ramp
low concrete divider separating walkway from road

segments.scene_description: The player exits the green tunnel into a covered exit ramp with smooth concrete walls. The space is transitional—still sheltered from the rain but opening up ahead. Overhead streetlights continue to illuminate the wet asphalt path as the camera moves forward toward the visible exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza under mega-highway structure in heavy rain

events.description: exiting covered area into open space with visible heavy rainfall and sky exposure
turning right to navigate around the base of the circular overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking through the rain-soaked plaza beneath the massive circular overpass, navigating around parked vehicles and turning toward the intersection

entered.detail: massive multi-level circular highway structure dominating the skyline
large illuminated digital billboards with colorful advertisements
tall street lamps casting light through the rain
yellow sports car parked along the curb
heavy raindrops visible falling through the air and streetlight beams
urban buildings with lit windows and neon signage

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered ramp, the scene opens into a vast plaza beneath a massive circular highway overpass. Heavy rain falls visibly through the artificial lighting, creating a cyberpunk atmosphere with neon billboards and wet reflective streets. The player navigates around parked vehicles, turning right to follow the curve of the mega-structure toward the illuminated intersection ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the oppressive shelter of a concrete underpass into a vast, rain-drenched cyberpunk plaza. It begins beneath a massive highway overpass, moving past directional signs for Pacifica and red warning markers toward the dark mouth of a tunnel. As the camera enters the tunnel, the environment shifts into a narrow, enclosed corridor lined with distinctive green ceramic tiles and recessed overhead lighting. The scene then transitions through a smooth concrete exit ramp that gradually opens up, leading the camera out from the shelter and into the heavy rainfall. Finally, the view expands into a wide plaza beneath a colossal circular highway structure, where the camera navigates around parked vehicles amidst glowing neon billboards and reflective, wet streets.
